loader.doc: Loader spec per docs/GRIDS_API.md §10. Object with keys {path, reader, check}: path is a filesystem path (may be sandboxed), reader is one of 'auto'|'nc4'|'mpas_mesh', check is one of 'strict'|'lenient'. Required because MPAS is a loader-backed family; the binding runtime derives cell/edge/vertex geometry from the referenced mesh file.

ghosts.doc: Halo cell width. Must be 0 for loader-backed grids; the mesh file defines the full interior.

dtype.doc: Element precision: 'float64' or 'float32'. Cross-binding conformance is only promised at float64.
